mapper.insert: insert into `user_address`(user_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, is_default, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{receiverAddress}, #{isDefault}, NOW())
mapper.update: update `user_address` set user_id = #{userId}, receiver_name = #{receiverName}, receiver_phone = #{receiverPhone}, receiver_address = #{receiverAddress}, is_default = #{isDefault}, create_time = NOW() where id = #{id}
